ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator or artist of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the album */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a single */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the album */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the album information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Artist's date of birth */,
  "country" TEXT /* Artist's country of origin */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "num_albums" INTEGER /* Total number of albums by the artist */,
  "total_followers" INTEGER /* Total number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the artist's works */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the artist information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre, if applicable */,
  "num_artists" INTEGER /* Total number of artists associated with the genre */,
  "total_albums" INTEGER /* Total number of albums associated with the genre */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the genre information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the track in minutes */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the track */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the track */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the track */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the track information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's biography or description */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "num_followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "num_following" INTEGER /* Number of artists or users the user follows */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being reviewed */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being reviewed (optional) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following another user or artist */,
  "followed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or artist being followed */,
  "follow_type" TEXT /* Type of follow (e.g., 'user', 'artist') */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the follow was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "followed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is primary for the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is primary for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., 'play', 'like', 'follow') */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content (e.g., album, track, artist) */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., 'album', 'track', 'artist') */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
